verdict: reconciliation in progress — V1C-04 (delegated administration), V1C-05 (support approval), V1C-07 (MFA/session/lockout), V1C-13 (data governance), V1C-14 (tenant import/export), V1C-15 (object storage), V1C-16 (workflow engine / approvals), V1C-19 (compliance reports), V1C-20 (developer portal / SDK / sandbox re-scope), and V1C-25 (i18n validation) delivered-and-proven and closed. 9 capability completions + 0 deprecated packages remain before the cut.
